input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Find NFL Wild Card results
with open('articles/2026/01/11/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = a.get('title','') or ''
        for kw in ['Rams', 'Panthers', 'Chargers', 'Patriots', 'Wild Card', 'playoff', 'Bears', 'Packers', '49ers', 'Eagles', 'Bills', 'Jaguars', 'Texans', 'Steelers', 'Seahawks', 'Broncos']:
            if kw in title:
                print(title[:140])
                break
" | head -25
input.description: Find NFL Wild Card results Jan 11
